'''zawumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fogfall|fogfall]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fogfall|fogfall]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zawumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæwimith|zæwimith]] || [[word:zæwimij|zæwimij]] || [[word:zæwimish|zæwimish]] || [[word:zæwimi|zæwimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawuwumuth|zawuwumuth]] || [[word:zawuwumuj|zawuwumuj]] || [[word:zawuwumush|zawuwumush]] || [[word:zawuwumu|zawuwumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawumuth|zawumuth]] || [[word:zawumuj|zawumuj]] || [[word:zawumush|zawumush]] || [[word:zawumu|zawumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawufmuth|zawufmuth]] || [[word:zawufmuj|zawufmuj]] || [[word:zawufmush|zawufmush]] || [[word:zawufmuf|zawufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zawumuthu|zawumuthu]] || [[word:zawumuju|zawumuju]] || [[word:zawumushu|zawumushu]] || [[word:zawumuku|zawumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zawumuth|zawumuth]] || [[word:zawumuj|zawumuj]] || [[word:zawumush|zawumush]] || [[word:zawumu|zawumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zawumuthul|zawumuthul]] || [[word:zawumujul|zawumujul]] || [[word:zawumushul|zawumushul]] || [[word:zawumukul|zawumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zawumuthuthu|zawumuthuthu]] || [[word:zawumujuju|zawumujuju]] || [[word:zawumushushu|zawumushushu]] || [[word:zawumuku|zawumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zawumuthun|zawumuthun]] || [[word:zawumujun|zawumujun]] || [[word:zawumushun|zawumushun]] || [[word:zawumukun|zawumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zawumuthuoro|zawumuthuoro]] || [[word:zawumujuoro|zawumujuoro]] || [[word:zawumushuoro|zawumushuoro]] || [[word:zawumukuoro|zawumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
